tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Block-Ubuntu-HTTPS-Uploads"
        set uuid 4dee490a-2b4d-51f1-65d3-c5db012237d6
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
diagnose firewall iprope lookup 192.168.1.3 40000 203.0.113 .1 443 6
 lookup <src ip> <src port> <dst ip> <dst port> <protocol> <device>
Command fail. Return code -604

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
execute ping-options source 192.168.1.1
